meaning: n.审查,检查,鉴定,身体检查
examples: A checkup revealed a small tumour on the left lower lobe of his lung, but it had not yet metastasized.
The disease was detected during a routine checkup.
Buddy was given a physical checkup when he arrived at Tokyo's International Airport.
When Maggie's son was just a toddler, he was diagnosed with cancer during a routine checkup.
Patients will be monitored two months for safety issues, followed by a four-month and six-month checkup.
